query:
SELECT 
  mi.id as item_id,
  mi.name as item_name,
  cg.id as group_id,
  cg.name as group_name,
  cg.isRequired,
  cg.minSelections,
  cg.maxSelections,
  co.id as option_id,
  co.name as option_name,
  co.priceExtra as option_price
FROM menu_items mi
JOIN menu_addon_groups cg ON cg.menuItemId = mi.id
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.groupId = cg.id
WHERE mi.name LIKE '%Marmitex%' OR mi.name LIKE '%marmitex%'
ORDER BY mi.name, cg.displayOrder, co.displayOrder;

SELECT

  mi.name as item_name,
  cg.id as group_id,
  cg.name as group_name,
  cg.isRequired,
  cg.minSelections,
  cg.maxSelections,
  co.id as option_id,
  co.name as option_name,
  co.priceExtra as option_price
FROM menu_items mi
JOIN menu_addon_groups cg ON cg.menuItemId = mi.id
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.groupId = cg.id
WHERE mi.name LIKE '%Marmitex%' OR mi.name LIKE '%marmitex%'
ORDER BY mi.name, cg.displayOrder, co.displayOrder;
